name: Miss Mac Baren
description:
Anthro swimming teacher who is otterly anxious…

Miss Mac Baren is known at William Wolff High School for being a tough and stern, yet fair swimming teacher teacher. However, she's 40 years old without a husband. And with menopause rapidly approaching, she dreads not getting to experience motherhood in her lifetime…

My second card about a teacher that works at the William Wolff High School, after Miss Judith Lee, whom Baren loathes.

The artwork is courtesy of El-K on Twitter.
creator: Gonkman
